entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A medium-duration legume often grown as an intercrop

entities.name: INTERCROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity, specifically pigeonpea-based systems

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where pigeonpea-based intercropping systems are found

entities.description: A region where pigeonpea-based intercropping systems are found

entities.name: PRODUCTION EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency of crop production within intercropping systems

entities.name: MONETARY ADVANTAGE
entities.description: The financial benefit derived from the use of intercropping

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE
entities.description: The economy and balance sheet of nitrogen within the crop system

entities.name: ROOT BEHAVIOR
entities.description: The development and behavior of roots in pigeonpea

entities.name: COMPANION CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown alongside pigeonpea in intercropping systems
